title: [CI:DOCS] Revert "Reduce official image size"
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Unanticipated missing `dnf` functionality likely negatively impacts a significant number of image users.  Further exploration of size reduction is needed, but we cannot (likely) swap to `microdnf` easily.

This reverts commit cdb1a4ff8eec302320342f28ebc956e487a214bb.

#### How to verify it

Not required, this reverts to previous state.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes: #5349

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:

The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [cevich,flouthoc] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@TomSweeneyRedHat mind popping one more slash-lgtm on this?

Hey there, the revert commit has not yet been applied to the RedHat Repository.
There only the 21 hour old Tags are present:
https://quay.io/repository/buildah/stable?tab=tags
Maby you can trigger the build system that it can be used again.
Thanks and Greetings :)
@cevich do you have a way to repush the image?  I know it happens automatically every 24 hours, but I'm not sure what the actual time is for the update.

[The build finished and pushed at about 11:21am EST](https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6659462702825472).  Since [the original change](https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5347) merged at 9am EST, with no version bumps, the run today should have overwritten all the affected tags.
